input_text: The process that determines whether a potential donor is eligible for blood donation
NL_requirements: The system must receive donorInformation at the start of the process.
The donor must complete the health questionnaire.
A medical staff member must perform the hemoglobin check.
If the hemoglobinLevel is less than 12.5, the system must mark the donor as ineligible.
The health questionnaire must be completed before the interview is conducted.
A medical staff member must conduct the donor interview.
If the isEligible status is false, the system must ensure blood collection does not occur.
The screening process must be completed within 1800 seconds of donor registration.
The system must send the eligibilityStatus to the donor.
The eligibility status must be recorded before blood collection can begin.
